'''Aarn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] living on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] had [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|conquered]]
and [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongformed]] the planet into [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. His features bore evidence of Shaming going back several generations, but he did not appear to have any direct defects on him. Like many Shamed Ones, Aarn heard of the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]] and took to it.<ref name="Force Heretic" />

When [[Nom Anor]] heard of him talking about how discontented the Yuuzhan Vong were over the failures of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war]], the rebellious nature of the [[World Brain]], and the repression by [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]], Anor quickly realized that Aarn was preaching another heresy—that of rebellion against Shimrra and the [[Elite (Yuuzhan Vong)|Elite]].<ref name="Force Heretic" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}}
